allow: Bash(ls -la /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/config/ 2>/dev/null || echo "No config/ dir at root"; find /home/amb/Code/AmbVision -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.weights" -o -name "*.pt" -o -name "*.pth" 2>/dev/null | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v .git)

Bash(mkdir -p /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/output && conda run -n ambvision python /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/src/pymod/infereX3D3.py -c /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/config/ -v /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/Data/S22W1.mp4 -l /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/output/S22W1.log 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(ffmpeg -i /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/Data/S22W1.mp4 -vf scale=-2:480 -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 -c:a copy /home/amb/Code/AmbVision/Data/S22W1_480p.mp4 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(ffmpeg -i Data/S22W2.mp4 -vf scale=854:480 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -c:a copy Data/S22W2_480p.mp4)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -E '\.py$' | { read -r f; ruff check --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
